title: CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g
content_html:
In Bangladesh, where humidity, pollution, and temperature shifts stress the skin daily, a targeted nighttime care step makes a meaningful difference. CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g is a non-greasy, fragrance-free moisturizer formulated to support the skin’s natural overnight renewal process. Developed with dermatologists, this cream is suitable for normal to dry skin types and works well under the humid conditions of Dhaka. This product is designed for anyone looking to maintain skin barrier function and improve surface texture while they sleep, without heavy or sticky residue.

Key Benefits

  • Contains peptides that signal skin cells to support collagen production, helping to improve skin firmness and reduce the appearance of fine lines over time.
  • Hyaluronic acid attracts and holds moisture within the upper layers of the skin, providing sustained hydration that counteracts dryness caused by air conditioning and pollution.
  • Three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) work together to restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier, reducing transepidermal water loss and protecting against environmental irritants common in urban Bangladesh.
  • Lightweight, non-comedogenic gel-cream texture absorbs quickly without clogging pores, making it suitable for humid evenings even in Dhaka’s climate.
  • MVE Delivery Technology releases moisturizing ingredients gradually throughout the night, offering long-lasting hydration without a heavy feel.

Key Ingredients

  • Peptides – Short-chain amino acids that act as signaling molecules. When applied topically, they encourage fibroblasts to produce collagen and elastin, which helps maintain skin structure and elasticity.
  • Hyaluronic Acid – A humectant capable of holding up to 1,000 times its weight in water. It binds moisture to the skin surface, creating a plumping effect and supporting a smoother appearance.
  • Ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) – Lipid molecules that make up about 50% of the skin’s outer layer. Replenishing ceramides reinforces the barrier function, preventing moisture loss and reducing sensitivity to external stressors like humidity and particulate matter.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) – Contributes to even skin tone and helps calm redness, an added benefit for skin exposed to urban irritants.

Best For

  • Normal, dry, and combination skin types
  • Sensitive skin that reacts to fragrances or heavy creams
  • Those experiencing mild dehydration or dullness from air conditioning, commuting, or city pollution
  • Individuals looking for a non-greasy overnight moisturizer that supports barrier repair
  • Skin showing early signs of surface texture changes or fine lines

Not Recommended For

  • Very oily or acne-prone skin that prefers gel-only formulas – although non-comedogenic, the cream texture may feel too rich for some oily skin types in high humidity
  • Anyone with a known allergy to any listed ingredient (check full INCI list before first use)
  • Those who react to niacinamide – while rare, a patch test on the inner arm is advised for first-time users

How to Use

  1. Start with clean, dry skin after your evening cleanse and any water-based serums (allow serums to absorb for 1–2 minutes).
  2. Scoop a pea-sized amount (approximately 0.5–0.7 g) of CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g onto your fingertip.
  3. Dot the cream on your forehead, both cheeks, nose, and chin.
  4. Gently smooth outward and upward using light, even strokes – do not rub aggressively. Include the neck area if desired.
  5. Allow the cream to absorb for 2–3 minutes before going to bed. A slight initial sheen is normal; it will settle as the product locks in moisture.
  6. Use every night as the final step of your evening routine. Avoid over-application – more does not increase benefits and may feel heavy in humid weather.

Routine Fit

Apply CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream as the last step of your nighttime regimen, after cleansing and any treatment serums. In Bangladesh’s humid climate, reduce product amount slightly during monsoon months if your skin feels comfortably moisturized after a lighter layer. For best results in Dhaka’s environment, pair this cream with a gentle cleanser like CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser to avoid stripping the barrier, and follow with a broad-spectrum sunscreen in the morning. This cream is designed for PM use only – not recommended for daytime because of its richer texture and specific overnight delivery system.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule 100ml
content_html:
The SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule 100ml is a fast-absorbing serum designed to deliver visible brightening and soothing care for skin exposed to urban environmental stress. Originally recommended by a customer in our community, it has become a staple for those seeking a radiant complexion in Dhaka’s high humidity and pollution. This ampoule uses encapsulated Madecassoside from Madagascar Centella Asiatica to help even out skin tone and reduce the appearance of dark spots, while its lightweight formula absorbs quickly without leaving a sticky residue—perfect for Bangladesh’s warm climate.

Key Benefits

  • Brightens uneven skin tone: The encapsulated Madecassoside in the ampoule helps reduce the visibility of dark spots and post-acne marks, promoting a more even and luminous complexion over regular use.
  • Lightweight, non-greasy hydration: Unlike heavy serums that feel sticky in humid weather, this formula absorbs quickly into the skin, providing deep nourishment without clogging pores or leaving residue.
  • Strengthens skin barrier function: Enriched with Centella Asiatica extract, the ampoule helps reinforce the skin’s natural defenses, making it more resilient against pollution, heat, and other environmental stressors common in Dhaka.
  • Calms irritation and redness: The soothing properties of Madagascar Centella Asiatica help reduce inflammation and calm skin stressed by pollution and UV exposure, supporting a healthier overall skin tone.
  • Encapsulated delivery for stability: The capsule technology protects active ingredients like Madecassoside until they are released on the skin, ensuring better absorption and efficacy.

Key Ingredients

  • Madagascar Centella Asiatica Extract: Sourced directly from Madagascar, this plant extract is rich in amino acids, beta-carotene, and fatty acids. It works by promoting collagen synthesis and soothing inflammation, which helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and calms irritation caused by pollution.
  • Madecassoside: A key active compound from Centella Asiatica, encapsulated to maintain stability. Once applied, it slowly releases to help regulate melanin production and support even skin tone, while also reinforcing the skin barrier against moisture loss.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): Present in the formulation to assist in brightening dark spots and improving skin texture. It works by inhibiting melanin transfer to the skin surface and enhancing ceramide production for a healthier barrier.
  • Hyaluronic Acid: Provides lightweight hydration by attracting and retaining moisture in the skin, ensuring the ampoule delivers nourishment without heaviness—key for humid conditions where excess water can lead to stickiness.

Best For

  • Oily, combination, and normal skin types that prefer lightweight, non-comedogenic textures.
  • Sensitive or reactive skin prone to redness and irritation from pollution or sun exposure.
  • Those struggling with uneven skin tone, dark spots, or post-acne hyperpigmentation.
  • People living in urban environments with high humidity (e.g., Dhaka) who need a serum that absorbs quickly and works effectively without clogging pores.

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with known allergy or sensitivity to Centella Asiatica or any listed ingredient should avoid use or perform a patch test first.
  • Very dry or dehydrated skin that requires rich, occlusive moisturizers may find this ampoule insufficient as a standalone product; it should be layered with a thicker moisturizer.
  • Those with active open wounds, severe eczema, or inflamed skin conditions should consult a dermatologist before introducing new active ingredients.
  • Pregnant or nursing individuals are advised to patch test and consult their healthcare provider, as niacinamide and Centella are generally safe but professional guidance is recommended.

How to Use

  1. After cleansing and applying toner, dispense 2–3 drops of the ampoule into your palm.
  2. Gently press the product onto your face and neck using your fingertips—avoid rubbing or pulling, especially in hot, humid conditions where skin can be more sensitive.
  3. Allow the ampoule to absorb fully for about 30 seconds before applying the next step in your routine.
  4. Use twice daily (morning and evening) for best results. In the morning, follow with a broad-spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30+) to protect the brightening effects.
  5. If layering with other serums, apply this ampoule first as it has a lighter consistency, then follow with richer treatments.
  6. During Dhaka’s monsoon season, reduce to one drop if you experience any feeling of stickiness—the formula is designed to be lightweight, but personal preference may vary.

Routine Fit

This ampoule fits best in the treatment step of both your AM and PM skincare routines, after toner and before moisturizer. In the morning, pair it with a lightweight, water-based moisturizer and a high-SPF sunscreen (essential in Bangladesh’s intense UV conditions). In the evening, use it before your night cream or sleeping mask. For optimal brightening, combine this ampoule with a gentle vitamin C serum (alternating mornings) or a mild exfoliant once or twice a week—but avoid using too many actives at once to prevent irritation. In Dhaka’s humid climate, you may skip a heavy moisturizer if your skin feels adequately hydrated; instead, seal the ampoule with a gel-cream. If you use a toner with salicylic acid or other exfoliating acids, wait 2–3 minutes before applying this ampoule to allow the pH to balance. The SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule integrates seamlessly into a simple routine for anyone seeking a brighter, more even complexion while coping with urban environmental challenges.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: Medicube Deep Vita C Capsule Cream 55ml
content_html:
The Medicube Deep Vita C Capsule Cream 55ml is a moisturizer formulated with a stabilized Vitamin C derivative, designed to support skin brightness and improve visible texture. This cream is suitable for those living in urban environments, such as Dhaka, where skin can be exposed to high humidity, heat, and pollution. It provides a practical addition to daily skincare routines for anyone looking to nourish their skin and maintain a more even, glowy look.

Key Benefits

  • Brightens dull skin: Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) works to gradually reduce the appearance of dark spots and uneven pigmentation, promoting a more uniform and radiant complexion.
  • Antioxidant protection: The vitamin C content helps neutralize free radicals caused by UV exposure and pollution, which is especially beneficial in high‑traffic, humid cities like Dhaka.
  • Deep moisture delivery: The capsule‑type formula contains moisturizing ingredients that help the cream absorb deeply, providing long‑lasting hydration without a greasy finish.
  • Supports skin barrier: The inclusion of ceramides and glycerin helps strengthen the skin’s natural barrier, keeping water in and irritants out in changing weather conditions.

Key Ingredients

  • Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid): A form of pure vitamin C that targets hyperpigmentation, dullness, and uneven tone. It works by inhibiting melanin production in the skin and promoting collagen synthesis.
  • Ceramide NP: A lipid that restores the skin’s barrier and helps retain moisture. It reduces water loss, which is important when humidity levels are high (which can paradoxically dehydrate skin).
  • Glycerin: A humectant that draws water from the air into the skin, providing immediate and lasting hydration without a heavy residue.
  • Tocopherol (Vitamin E): An antioxidant that protects the skin’s lipid barrier from oxidative stress and helps stabilise the vitamin C in the formula.
  • Betaine: A naturally derived amino acid that maintains the skin’s moisture balance and soothes irritation, making the cream comfortable to wear even in hot weather.

Best For

  • Normal, combination, and oily skin types that need lightweight hydration.
  • Dull or tired-looking skin that lacks radiance.
  • Those noticing early signs of uneven skin tone or sun damage.
  • People living in humid climates who want a moisturizer that absorbs quickly and doesn’t feel heavy.
  • Skin that is exposed to high levels of environmental pollution.

Not Recommended For

  • Extremely dry or flaky skin that requires thicker, more occlusive creams (the gel‑cream texture may feel insufficient).
  • Individuals with known allergy or sensitivity to vitamin C or any of the other listed ingredients (always perform a patch test).
  • Those currently using high‑strength exfoliating acids or retinol in the same routine, as vitamin C can increase skin sensitivity when layered improperly.

How to Use

  1. Start with a clean, toned face — apply any water‑based serums first (for example, hyaluronic acid).
  2. Take a pea‑sized amount (about 0.5cm) of the cream and warm it between your fingertips for a few seconds.
  3. Gently press and smooth the cream onto your face and neck, avoiding the immediate eye area.
  4. Use the cream in your morning routine — it works well under sunscreen and doesn’t pill under makeup.
  5. If applying in the evening, use it as the last step before sleep (or follow with a light sleeping pack if you have very dry skin).
  6. Store the cream in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain vitamin C stability.

Routine Fit

In an AM routine, apply the Medicube Deep Vita C Capsule Cream 55ml after your serum and before sunscreen. The lightweight texture makes it ideal for Dhaka’s humid climate — it provides enough hydration without leaving a sticky film. For a complete brightening regime, pair it with a gentle Vitamin C serum or a niacinamide toner. In the PM, use it after a moisturising essence if your skin feels dry. Because of its antioxidant properties, this cream can also be worn as a day‑time protective layer when you spend time outdoors. Always follow with a broad‑spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30+) in the morning. If you have oily skin, this cream can be used as a single moisturising step; if you have drier skin, you may want to layer a heavier cream at night. The capsule formula is designed to withstand heat and maintain its efficacy, making it a practical choice for everyday use in Bangladesh.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil 30ml
content_html:
For anyone navigating Dhaka’s humidity, pollution, and heat, finding a cleanser that effectively removes buildup without stripping the skin can be a challenge. The SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil 30ml offers a refreshingly simple solution. This travel-friendly Korean oil cleanser glides over the skin to dissolve sunscreen, sebum, and urban impurities without leaving a heavy residue. It is a practical choice for those seeking a gentle first step in their double cleansing routine, specifically adapted for Bangladesh’s warm climate.

Key Benefits

  • Thorough Impurity Removal: Naturally derived oils effectively break down waterproof sunscreen, excess sebum, and pollution particles accumulated during a day in Dhaka’s environment.
  • Lightweight, Non-Greasy Texture: Unlike heavy balms or sticky oils, this formula has a fluid consistency that rinses cleanly with water, preventing clogged pores in humid weather.
  • Soothing Cleanse: Contains Centella Asiatica extract to calm skin stressed by environmental exposure while removing impurities.
  • Moisture Barrier Protection: Respects the skin’s natural lipid layer by cleansing thoroughly without over-drying or leaving it feeling tight.
  • Pore Congestion Care: Helps dissolve hardened sebum and sunscreen residue inside pores, reducing the appearance of blockages over consistent use.

Key Ingredients

  • Centella Asiatica Extract (Cica): Provides soothing and calming properties to help mitigate skin stress caused by pollution and UV exposure during the cleansing process.
  • Mineral Oil & Sunflower Seed Oil: Lightweight emollients that effectively dissolve oil-based impurities like makeup and sebum without penetrating deeply or clogging pores.
  • PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate & PEG-20 Glyceryl Triisostearate (Emulsifiers): Enable the oil to transform into a milky emulsion upon contact with water, ensuring it rinses away completely without leaving a film on the skin.
  • Betaine: A humectant derived from sugar beets that helps retain moisture in the skin during the washing process, preventing dehydration.
  • Ethylhexylglycerin: Helps preserve the formula naturally and provides gentle antimicrobial support to keep the product stable in Bangladesh’s humid storage conditions.

Best For

  • Normal, combination, oily, and sensitive skin types looking for a gentle first cleanser.
  • Individuals who wear heavy sunscreen (physical or chemical) or lightweight makeup daily in humid climates.
  • Those experiencing congestion or clogged pores due to sweat, sunscreen, and urban pollution buildup.
  • People with dehydrated skin who need a non-stripping cleanser that maintains moisture levels.
  • Anyone beginning a double cleansing routine who wants a simple, travel-friendly oil cleanser for daily use.

Not Recommended For

  • Dry skin types or those with severely compromised skin barriers may benefit more from a richer cleansing balm or cream-to-oil formula with additional lipids.
  • Individuals strictly following an oil-free regimen for acne management should avoid any oil-based cleanser unless directed by a dermatologist.
  • Those with a known allergy to sunflower seed oil or any component of the base oils should patch test on a small area before full use.

How to Use

  1. Dry Application: Start with completely dry hands and a dry face. Dispense 1-2 pumps (about 1ml for the 30ml size) into your palm.
  2. Massage: Gently massage the oil onto dry skin using circular motions for 60-90 seconds. Focus on areas with heavy sunscreen, sebum, or makeup accumulation around the nose and chin.
  3. Emulsify: Add a small amount of lukewarm water (about half a teaspoon) to your hands and continue massaging. The oil will turn into a milky white consistency, indicating emulsification is occurring.
  4. Rinse: Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water until skin feels clean and residue-free. Pat dry gently with a clean towel, then follow with a water-based cleanser for a complete routine.

Routine Fit

In Bangladesh’s humid climate, the SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil 30ml is best incorporated into your evening routine as the first step of double cleansing (PM only for most skin types). It is specifically designed to melt away the combination of Dhaka’s urban grime, waterproof sunscreen, and excess sebum that accumulates throughout the day. After using this oil, follow with a gentle water-based cleanser — such as a low-pH foam or Centella gel cleanser — to remove any remaining water-soluble impurities. For those with very oily skin, this oil can also be used in the morning if heavy occlusives were applied overnight. Avoid using it with additional oil-based exfoliants or serums in the same step to prevent overloading the skin. Store the bottle in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to preserve the integrity of the naturally derived oils and Centella extract in Bangladesh’s heat.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: Cosrx The 6 Peptide Skin Booster Serum 150ml
content_html:
Cosrx The 6 Peptide Skin Booster Serum 150ml is a lightweight, multi-tasking serum designed to address common skin concerns intensified by Dhaka’s hot and humid climate. Pollution, sweat, and heat can lead to dullness, enlarged pores, uneven tone, and loss of firmness. This serum combines a blend of six peptides with niacinamide to support skin structure, improve texture, and regulate sebum. It is suitable for those looking for a daily booster that hydrates, firms, and refines pores without feeling heavy.

Key Benefits

  • Supports skin firmness and elasticity — The six-peptide complex works to stimulate collagen synthesis in the skin’s deeper layers, helping to maintain a lifted, plump appearance over time. This is particularly helpful for those experiencing early signs of laxity from environmental stress.
  • Helps even out skin tone — Niacinamide, a well-studied form of vitamin B3, inhibits melanosome transfer and reduces the appearance of dark spots and post-acne marks. Regular use can lead to a more uniform complexion, especially in skin prone to hyperpigmentation from sun or pollution.
  • Minimises the look of pores and controls sebum — Niacinamide also regulates sebocyte activity, helping to reduce excess oil production. Combined with the serum’s lightweight texture, this helps tighten pores and keep skin matte throughout Dhaka’s humid afternoons.
  • Hydrates without stickiness — The serum contains humectants like glycerin and sodium hyaluronate that attract moisture to the skin. Because it is formulated in a booster base, it absorbs quickly and leaves no greasy residue — ideal for layering in high humidity.
  • Strengthens the skin barrier — Peptides and niacinamide both support the synthesis of structural proteins and ceramides, helping to fortify the barrier against pollution and daily environmental aggressors common in urban Bangladesh.

Key Ingredients

  • Copper Tripeptide-1 — A signalling peptide that stimulates collagen and elastin production. It also has antioxidant properties, helping to neutralise free radicals generated by UV exposure and pollution.
  • Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4 — A pentapeptide that mimics the fragment of collagen that triggers fibroblasts to produce new collagen. It supports skin repair and firmness.
  • Acetyl Hexapeptide-8 — Often referred to as a “relaxing” peptide, it works by inhibiting the release of neurotransmitters that cause muscle contraction, helping to soften expression lines over time.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) — At a concentration that supports sebum regulation, pore refinement, and even skin tone. It also enhances barrier function by boosting ceramide production.
  • Sodium Hyaluronate — A low-molecular-weight form of hyaluronic acid that penetrates the upper layers of skin to provide long-lasting hydration without heaviness.

Best For

  • Oily and combination skin types that need hydration without added oil.
  • Those with enlarged pores or rough texture looking for a daily refining step.
  • Skin showing early signs of loss of firmness, such as subtle sagging or tired appearance.
  • Uneven skin tone, including sun spots, post-acne marks, and general dullness.
  • Individuals in humid climates who want a mattifying, pore-tightening serum that can be worn under sunscreen or makeup.

Not Recommended For

  • Those with known sensitivity to peptides or niacinamide — perform a patch test on the inner arm before full-face application.
  • Severely dehydrated or compromised skin barriers that require a richer, occlusive formula; this serum is a lightweight booster and may not provide enough emollience alone.

How to Use

  1. After cleansing and toning, dispense 2–3 drops of the serum into your palm. (A single pump or dropperful is roughly the right amount.)
  2. Warm the product between your hands for a few seconds, then press gently onto your face and neck. Avoid rubbing — pressing helps absorption and minimises irritation.
  3. Allow the serum to absorb for 30–60 seconds before applying the next product in your routine (moisturiser or sunscreen).
  4. Use twice daily — once in the morning after cleansing and before sunscreen, and once in the evening after toning and before your moisturiser.
  5. If you are new to peptides, start with once daily (PM only) for the first week, then increase to twice daily if no irritation occurs.

Routine Fit

This serum fits best in the booster or essence step of your routine — after cleansing and toner, but before moisturiser or sunscreen. In Dhaka’s humid climate, you can skip a heavy moisturiser in the AM and follow the serum directly with a lightweight, water-resistant sunscreen (SPF 30+). In the PM, layer it under a gel or water-based moisturiser if you have oily skin, or under a cream with ceramides if your skin is combination. The serum is compatible with most other products, but avoid layering it directly after a strong exfoliating acid (like 10% lactic acid or 2% salicylic acid) — wait 10–15 minutes or alternate the two in different routines. For best results, pair with a gentle foaming cleanser and a niacinamide-based moisturiser to complement the pore-refining and brightening effects. Because it contains peptides, it can be used alongside vitamin C (in the AM) or retinol (in the PM) — simply apply the serum first, let it dry, then follow with the active. If using retinol, wait 20 minutes after the serum to reduce potential irritation. The 150ml bottle typically lasts 3–4 months with twice-daily use, making it an affordable, daily investment for Dhaka’s challenging environment.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: Innisfree Intensive Triple-Shield Sunscreen SPF50+ PA++++ 50ml
content_html:
Innisfree Intensive Triple-Shield Sunscreen SPF50+ PA++++ 50ml is a daily sunscreen designed for high-protection needs in challenging environments. Formulated with a triple-shield technology, it defends against UVA/UVB rays, fine dust particles, and visible light. With SPF50+ and PA++++, it offers the highest level of UV protection available in a chemical-mineral hybrid sunscreen. This product is particularly suited for Bangladesh’s humid, pollution-heavy urban settings like Dhaka, where prolonged sun exposure and airborne particulate matter accelerate skin stress. It provides a lightweight, non-greasy finish that does not clog pores, making it a practical choice for everyday wear under makeup or alone.

Key Benefits

  • Triple-shield protection – Combines UV filters, fine dust blocking ingredients, and antioxidants to shield skin from sun, pollution, and blue light. The formula creates a barrier that reduces adhesion of particulate matter common in Dhaka’s traffic-heavy areas.
  • Water-resistant and sweat-resistant – Retains efficacy for up to 80 minutes in water or heavy perspiration. Ideal for humid weather, sudden rain, or outdoor commutes without frequent reapplication.
  • Brightening and even-toning effect – Contains niacinamide (vitamin B3) which helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and uneven pigmentation caused by cumulative UV exposure. Regular use supports a more uniform skin tone.
  • Non-sticky, lightweight finish – Absorbs quickly without leaving a white cast or greasy residue. Suitable for combination and oily skin types common in Bangladesh’s warm climate.
  • Antioxidant protection – Green tea extract neutralizes free radicals generated by UV rays and environmental pollutants, helping to prevent oxidative stress that leads to premature skin aging.

Key Ingredients

  • Green tea extract (Camellia sinensis leaf extract) – Rich in polyphenols and catechins, it provides antioxidant activity that scavenges free radicals. It also has soothing properties that reduce redness and inflammation caused by sun exposure or pollution.
  • Niacinamide (vitamin B3) – A multifunctional ingredient that supports the skin barrier, improves surface texture, and inhibits melanin transfer to reduce hyperpigmentation. It also helps regulate sebum production, beneficial in humid conditions.
  • Zinc oxide (non-nano) – A physical UV filter that reflects and scatters UVA and UVB rays. It sits on the skin’s surface and provides broad-spectrum protection without being absorbed. Non-nano particles minimize whitening effect.
  • Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate (octinoxate) – A chemical UVB filter that absorbs UV radiation and converts it into heat. It enhances the sunscreen’s overall SPF performance.
  • Fine dust blocking complex – A blend of film-forming polymers and plant-derived ingredients that create a protective layer on the skin, reducing the adherence of airborne particulate matter (PM2.5 and PM10) common in urban Bangladesh.

Best For

  • Normal, combination, and oily skin types that need a matte, non-greasy sunscreen.
  • Sensitive skin prone to redness or irritation from high-SPF chemical sunscreens (zinc oxide provides gentle physical protection).
  • Individuals living in high-pollution areas (e.g., Dhaka, Chittagong) who want additional defense against fine dust and smog.
  • People who spend time outdoors for commuting, outdoor work, or leisure and require water-resistant protection.
  • Those looking for a sunscreen that doubles as a light moisturizer with brightening benefits.

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or dehydrated skin that needs a richer, emollient base – this sunscreen has a lightweight, slightly mattifying finish that may not provide enough moisture.
  • Individuals with known allergy to zinc oxide or any of the listed chemical UV filters (check ingredient list before use).
  • Those seeking a completely fragrance-free product – the formula contains a mild botanical scent from green tea extract.
  • People who prefer a purely mineral sunscreen without any chemical filters – this product combines both types.
  • If you have active breakouts with open wounds or severe acne, patch-test on a small area first to ensure no irritation.

How to Use

  1. Start with clean, dry skin after your moisturizer or serum. Shake the bottle well before use to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
  2. Dispense a generous amount – approximately 1.2 ml (about a half-teaspoon or two finger-length lines) for the face and neck. Do not skimp; insufficient application reduces SPF protection.
  3. Dot the sunscreen on your forehead, cheeks, nose, chin, and neck. Spread evenly using outward, upward strokes. Avoid rubbing vigorously – pat gently around the eye area.
  4. Allow the sunscreen to set for 2–3 minutes before applying makeup or going outdoors. This helps the film form properly for maximum protection.
  5. Reapply every 2 hours if you are in direct sunlight, sweating heavily, or after swimming/towel drying. For indoor office workers with minimal sun exposure, one morning application is usually sufficient.
  6. Remove thoroughly at the end of the day with an oil-based cleanser or micellar water to break down the water-resistant film, followed by your regular face wash.

Routine Fit

Innisfree Intensive Triple-Shield Sunscreen is a final step in your morning skincare routine. Apply it after your moisturizer and before any makeup or primer. In Bangladesh’s humid climate, you may choose to skip a separate moisturizer if your skin is oily – this sunscreen provides light hydration from green tea extract and niacinamide. For dry skin, layer a lightweight gel moisturizer underneath. It pairs well with vitamin C serums (apply before sunscreen) for added antioxidant protection. Do not mix with oil-based products that may compromise the sunscreen film. In the evening, use a gentle double-cleansing method to remove all traces. This product is not intended for nighttime use. For best results in Dhaka’s high-pollution environment, consider pairing it with a cleansing balm or oil to thoroughly remove fine dust particles at the end of the day.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: CeraVe Acne Foaming Cream Cleanser 150ml
content_html:
The CeraVe Acne Foaming Cream Cleanser 150ml is a foaming face wash formulated for acne-prone skin, particularly suited to the challenging climate of Bangladesh. Developed with dermatologists, this cleanser contains 4% benzoyl peroxide to target acne-causing bacteria and help clear pores. Its creamy yet foaming texture works to remove excess oil and impurities accumulated from Dhaka's humid and polluted environment without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier. Whether you are dealing with persistent breakouts or occasional blemishes, this cleanser offers a balanced approach to managing acne while maintaining overall skin health.

Key Benefits

  • Targets Acne Bacteria: Contains 4% benzoyl peroxide, an active ingredient that helps eliminate the bacteria contributing to acne and reduces inflammatory breakouts.
  • Deep Pore Cleansing: The foaming action gently removes excess sebum, dirt, and environmental pollutants, helping to keep pores clear in Bangladesh's high-humidity conditions.
  • Supports Skin Barrier: Enriched with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to help restore and maintain the skin's natural protective barrier, which can be compromised by harsh environmental factors.
  • Non-Comedogenic Formula: Designed not to clog pores, making it suitable for daily use even on sensitive, acne-prone skin.
  • Balanced Hydration: Includes glycerin, a humectant that draws moisture to the skin, ensuring the face does not feel overly tight or dry after washing.

Key Ingredients

  • Benzoyl Peroxide (4%): Works by introducing oxygen into the pores, which kills Cutibacterium acnes bacteria. It also acts as a chemical exfoliant, helping to remove dead skin cells and excess oil that can clog follicles.
  • Ceramides (1, 3, 6-II): These are lipids naturally found in the skin. They are essential for maintaining a healthy skin barrier. This cleanser contains a patented MVE technology to deliver these ceramides, helping to retain moisture and protect against irritation from pollution and humidity.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): Helps to calm the skin, improving overall skin tone and texture while supporting the barrier function. It works alongside benzoyl peroxide to reduce the look of post-acne marks.
  • Glycerin: A gentle humectant that prevents moisture loss, ensuring the cleansing process does not dehydrate the skin.

Best For

  • Individuals with oily, combination, and normal skin types experiencing mild to moderate acne.
  • Those looking for a daily foaming cleanser to manage breakouts caused by heat, humidity, and urban pollution common in Bangladesh.
  • People who prefer a non-drying cleanser that actively works on clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads while respecting the skin's moisture barrier.

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with known allergies or extreme sensitivity to benzoyl peroxide. A patch test is advised before first use.
  • Those with severely dry or compromised skin barriers should consult a dermatologist before introducing benzoyl peroxide products.
  • Concurrent use with high-concentration retinoids, salicylic acid, or other harsh acne treatments without professional guidance, as this may cause excessive dryness or irritation.
  • Application on broken, sunburned, or eczematous skin.

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water. Avoid using hot water as it can strip natural oils and increase irritation.
  2. Dispense 1-2 pumps of the CeraVe Acne Foaming Cream Cleanser into your palm. A little goes a long way due to its foaming texture.
  3. Massage gently onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 to 60 seconds. Focus on the T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) and areas prone to breakouts. Avoid the immediate eye area and lips.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water, ensuring no residue remains. Residue can cause stinging or irritation, especially with benzoyl peroxide.
  5. Pat dry with a clean, soft towel. Do not rub. Benzoyl peroxide can bleach fabrics, so ensure the face is completely dry before using a towel or pillowcase.
  6. Use once or twice daily (morning and evening). If dryness or peeling occurs, reduce use to once daily or every other day until your skin adjusts.

Routine Fit

This cleanser fits as the first step in your morning or evening skincare routine. In the morning, follow with a moisturizer and a broad-spectrum sunscreen (at least SPF 30), as benzoyl peroxide can increase the skin's sensitivity to the sun. In the evening, use it after removing makeup or sunscreen, then follow with a non-comedogenic moisturizer such as the CeraVe Moisturising Cream or CeraVe PM Facial Moisturising Lotion. In the high-humidity environment of Bangladesh, it pairs well with a light, gel-based moisturizer to maintain hydration without feeling heavy. Avoid layering with other potent active ingredients like retinoids or high-dose AHAs in the same session unless directed by a dermatologist.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: Cosrx Balancium Comfort Ceramide Cream Mist 120ml
content_html:
The Cosrx Balancium Comfort Ceramide Cream Mist 120ml is a lightweight, water-based mist formulated to deliver instant hydration and support the skin barrier without disrupting makeup. Imported directly from Korea and verified by the Emart team in Bangladesh, this mist is designed for local conditions where high humidity, heat, and urban pollution can leave skin feeling dry, dull, or tight. Its fine spray delivers a balanced layer of ceramides and humectants that absorb quickly, making it suitable for use throughout the day — whether you are commuting, working in an air-conditioned office, or simply need a midday refresh. This product targets those seeking a non-greasy, portable hydration solution that works over existing makeup and provides barrier-strengthening benefits in Bangladesh’s challenging climate.

Key Benefits

  • Provides lightweight hydration — The mist delivers a fine, even layer of water-soluble humectants (glycerin, betaine) that attract moisture to the skin surface, helping to offset dryness caused by air conditioning, sun exposure, or repeated cleansing.
  • Supports skin barrier function — Contains ceramide NP (a lipid that mimics the skin’s natural intercellular matrix) to help reinforce the stratum corneum, reducing transepidermal water loss and improving the skin’s ability to retain moisture in humid but dehydrating environments.
  • Soothes and calms surface irritation — Panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) and allantoin work together to reduce mild redness and stinging, making the mist useful after sun exposure or when the skin feels tight from pollution exposure.
  • Can be used over makeup without disturbing finish — The ultrafine spray nozzle ensures that the mist settles onto the skin without causing smudging, caking, or dripping, allowing for on-the-go rehydration throughout the day.
  • Helps combat dullness from environmental stress — By maintaining adequate hydration and barrier integrity, the mist supports a more even, visibly plump skin surface, addressing the dull appearance that often follows exposure to Dhaka’s particulate matter and high humidity.

Key Ingredients

  • Ceramide NP — A lipid molecule identical to one of the major ceramides naturally found in the skin. It integrates into the barrier to fill microscopic gaps between corneocytes, reducing water loss and reinforcing resistance to external irritants.
  • Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) — A humectant and mild anti-inflammatory that converts to pantothenic acid in the skin. It helps attract water, supports fibroblast activity for barrier repair, and can soothe transient tightness or prickling.
  • Allantoin — A keratolytic and soothing agent derived from comfrey root. It gently softens dry surface cells and calms minor irritation without stripping the skin, making it suitable for sensitive or reactive skin types.
  • Glycerin — A well-established humectant that pulls water from the atmosphere into the outer layers of the stratum corneum, maintaining hydration without feeling heavy or sticky.
  • Betaine — An amino acid derivative that acts as a natural osmolyte, helping skin cells retain water under osmotic stress (e.g., from air conditioning or sudden humidity shifts). It also imparts a smooth, non-tacky finish.

Best For

  • Normal, dry, combination, and oily skin types that need light, non-comedogenic hydration.
  • Individuals with a compromised or sensitive skin barrier (due to over-exfoliation, pollution, or fluctuating humidity).
  • Those who spend long hours in air-conditioned environments (offices, cars, shopping malls) where indoor humidity is low.
  • Users who want a daily hydration step that can be applied over sunscreen or makeup without affecting coverage.
  • Bangladesh-based customers looking for a portable, travel-friendly mist to rehydrate during commutes or outdoor activities in high heat.

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with a known allergy or sensitivity to any listed ingredient (especially ceramide NP or allantoin — patch test on inner arm before full use).
  • Those who prefer a thick, occlusive moisturizer as their sole hydration step; this mist is lightweight and works best as a supplementary or layering product.
  • People with active, weeping acne or open wounds on the face — although the formula is generally non-irritating, mist application can spread bacteria if skin is broken.
  • Users who dislike any spray containing a faint cosmetic scent (the product has a mild, natural smell from ingredients; no added fragrance is listed, but some may detect a slight note).

How to Use

  1. Shake the bottle gently before each use to ensure the ceramide and water components are evenly mixed.
  2. Hold the mist about 20–25 cm (8–10 inches) away from your face and close your eyes and mouth.
  3. Spray 3–5 pumps in an even, sweeping motion across the entire face and neck. Do not saturate; a light, even layer is sufficient.
  4. Allow the mist to settle for 10–15 seconds. Do not rub or pat in unless you are applying it onto bare skin; over makeup, let it air dry to avoid disturbing the product.
  5. Use as needed throughout the day — typically every 2–4 hours if you are in a dry environment, or after sweating, washing your face, or returning from outdoors.
  6. In a morning or evening skincare routine, spray after cleansing/toner and before moisturizer (if using a cream) or allow to absorb fully before applying sunscreen.

Routine Fit

In an AM routine, apply the Cosrx Balancium Comfort Ceramide Cream Mist after cleansing and toning, then follow with your usual serum, moisturizer, and sunscreen. The mist provides a boost of barrier-friendly lipids and humectants, preparing the skin for subsequent layers. In PM, it can be used after cleansing to replenish hydration before a richer night cream, or as a final step if you prefer a lighter finish. In Bangladesh’s humid months (March–October), the mist can double as your sole daytime hydration step if your skin tolerates it — simply spray after cleansing, let dry, then apply a water-based sunscreen. For those with very oily skin, it may replace a heavier cream. Keep the bottle in your bag for reapplication during heat waves or after long commutes — the fine mist will not interact with makeup, and the ceramide content helps protect against the dehydrating effects of sudden air-conditioning exposure. Pair it with any non-comedogenic moisturizer or sunscreen; avoid combining with occlusive balms that could trap the mist without letting it absorb.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: SKIN1004 Centella Hyalu Cica Water Fit Sun Serum 50ml
content_html:
SKIN1004 Centella Hyalu Cica Water Fit Sun Serum 50ml is a lightweight, hydrating sunscreen with a serum-like texture. Designed for daily protection in high-humidity environments like Dhaka, it combines broad-spectrum SPF with soothing and moisturizing ingredients. The formula absorbs quickly, leaves no white cast, and works as a multi-functional step—sunscreen, moisturizer, and serum—without adding stickiness. It suits those who want sun protection that feels barely there, especially in hot, muggy weather. This product is 100% authentic, directly imported from Korea.

Key Benefits

  • Provides SPF50+ PA++++ sun protection with a lightweight, water-fit finish that does not clog pores.
  • Contains Centella Asiatica extract to calm redness and irritation caused by heat, pollution, or UV exposure.
  • Delivers hydration through Hyaluronic Acid (multiple molecular weights) that draws moisture into the skin and helps retain it.
  • Leaves a natural dewy (not shiny) look under makeup without pilling, patchiness, or chalkiness.
  • Functions as a multitasking step, reducing the need for separate moisturizing and sun protection layers in humid conditions.

Key Ingredients

  • Centella Asiatica Extract – Contains madecassoside, asiaticoside, and asiatic acid, which support the skin's barrier integrity and help reduce visible redness by calming inflammatory mediators.
  • Hyaluronic Acid – A humectant that binds water to the skin's surface; different molecular weights allow deeper penetration for sustained hydration.
  • Niacinamide – Helps regulate sebum production and supports an even skin tone by inhibiting melanosome transfer; also improves the skin's barrier function.
  • Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) – Acts as a humectant and barrier-repairing agent, reinforcing moisture retention and soothing surface irritation.
  • Water-Fit Formulation – A microemulsion base that creates a thin, breathable film on the skin, minimizing residue even in high humidity.

Best For

  • Normal, combination, oily, and sensitive skin types that dislike heavy or greasy sunscreens.
  • Those living in humid climates (like Bangladesh) who need sun protection that stays lightweight all day.
  • People with redness-prone, irritation-prone, or acne-prone skin, as the formula is non-comedogenic and soothing.
  • Anyone looking for a sunscreen that doubles as a hydrating step under makeup.

Not Recommended For

  • Dry or dehydrated skin that requires richer emollient layers—this product is extremely lightweight and may not provide enough moisture on its own for very dry skin.
  • Those with a known allergy to any of the listed ingredients (check full INCI). A patch test is advised if you have highly reactive skin.
  • People who prefer a matte or oil-control finish; this sunscreen gives a subtle dewy glow.

How to Use

  1. After your moisturizer (or after serum if you skip moisturizer), dispense about 2-3 pumps (roughly a 2-finger amount) onto your palm.
  2. Dot the product onto the forehead, cheeks, nose, chin, and neck—an even layer across the face and exposed neck area.
  3. Spread outward in gentle, upward strokes. Do not rub aggressively; the serum spreads easily. Avoid the eye contour area if it causes irritation.
  4. Wait 2–3 minutes for the formula to set before applying makeup or going outdoors. This allows the sunscreen film to stabilize.
  5. Reapply every 2–3 hours if exposed to direct sun, sweating, or water. For daily office use in Dhaka, one morning application plus a midday re-spritz or powder SPF can suffice—but reapplication is recommended for outdoor activities.

Routine Fit

Use this product as the last step in your morning skincare routine, after cleansing, toner, serum, and moisturizer. In Bangladesh's heat and humidity, if you have oily or combination skin, you can even use it directly after a hydrating serum, skipping a separate moisturizer. It pairs well with water-based, non-silicone primers and foundations. For best results, apply it after a gentle vitamin C or niacinamide serum to boost antioxidant protection. Avoid layering with heavy oils or wax-based creams, as they may interfere with the sunscreen's water-fit finish. On days when humidity is extreme, a light dusting of translucent powder can tone down the dewy shine without breaking the sunscreen film.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: Cosrx AC Collection Acne Patch (26 Patches)
content_html:
For anyone navigating acne in Bangladesh’s humid, pollution-heavy environment, the Cosrx AC Collection Acne Patch (26 Patches) offers a targeted, no-fuss solution. These hydrocolloid patches are designed to be applied directly over individual pimples, creating a clean, protective seal. Whether you are dealing with a sudden breakout before an event or a stubborn spot that won’t settle, these patches work by absorbing excess fluid and oil from the blemish while shielding it from external irritants like dust and sweat.

Key Benefits

  • Absorbs impurities: The hydrocolloid material actively draws out pus and excess oil from the pimple, helping to flatten the spot and reduce its size overnight.
  • Protective barrier: Forms a transparent, waterproof seal that blocks out pollution, dirt, and bacteria commonly found in urban environments, preventing further aggravation.
  • Discreet wear: The thin, transparent design blends into most skin tones, making the patch nearly invisible during the day or night.
  • Adhesion in humidity: Formulated with strong, skin-friendly adhesive that stays securely in place even in Dhaka’s heat and high humidity, without peeling off prematurely.

Key Ingredients

  • Hydrocolloid: The primary active material. It consists of a gel-forming agent (often pectin or gelatin) that absorbs moisture and exudate from the wound. When applied to a pimple, it draws out fluid, creating a white, swollen appearance in the patch as it works.
  • Polyurethane film: The outer layer of the patch. It is thin, flexible, and breathable, allowing oxygen to reach the skin while keeping the hydrocolloid layer in place and preventing outside contaminants from entering.
  • Medical-grade adhesive: A gentle, hypoallergenic adhesive that secures the patch to the skin without causing irritation or leaving a sticky residue upon removal.

Best For

  • Individuals with active, inflamed pimples that have come to a head or are oozing.
  • Those with oily or combination skin types prone to breakouts in humid weather.
  • People who need a quick, physical barrier to protect a pimple from touching pillowcases, phone screens, or face masks.
  • Users looking for a non-irritating, spot-treatment option for occasional or hormonal acne.

Not Recommended For

  • Deep, cystic acne or blind pimples that have not yet surfaced (the patch cannot absorb fluid from under the skin).
  • Open wounds, cuts, or severely broken skin around the acne area.
  • Individuals with known allergies to hydrocolloid or adhesive bandages. A patch test on a small area of skin is advised before full use.
  • Use on large areas of clustered acne; these patches are designed for individual spot treatment.

How to Use

  1. Cleanse and dry: Start with clean, dry skin. Gently wash the area with a mild cleanser and pat dry completely. The patch will not adhere well to damp or oily skin.
  2. Select the patch: Choose a patch size that fully covers the pimple with a small margin around it. The Cosrx AC Collection Acne Patch comes in multiple sizes on one sheet.
  3. Apply directly: Peel the patch from the backing using the tab. Place it directly over the pimple, pressing down gently from the center outward to ensure full contact with the skin.
  4. Leave on for 6–8 hours: For best results, wear the patch overnight or for at least 6 hours during the day. The patch will turn white as it absorbs fluid.
  5. Remove gently: Peel the patch off slowly from the edges. Do not pull quickly, as this may irritate the skin. Dispose of the patch after a single use.
  6. Follow up: After removal, you may apply a soothing moisturizer or continue with your regular skincare routine. Do not reapply a new patch to the same spot immediately.

Routine Fit

In a typical AM/PM routine, apply the Cosrx AC Collection Acne Patch as the final step in your evening skincare, after cleansing and before any heavy creams or oils. For daytime use in Bangladesh’s humid climate, apply the patch after your morning serum or moisturizer, but before sunscreen. The patch creates a waterproof seal, so it can be worn under sunscreen or makeup without issue. Avoid applying the patch over active exfoliants (like AHAs or BHAs) or strong active ingredients (like benzoyl peroxide) on the same spot, as this may cause irritation. Instead, use the patch on clean, bare skin for the most effective absorption. In Dhaka’s pollution-heavy environment, this patch is particularly useful as a physical shield during the day or as an overnight treatment to help manage breakouts without disrupting your broader routine.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.
